QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_86

question.text: Which of the following is the settlor of NPS Trust?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** PFRDA is the settlor of NPS Trust. The Trust is set up under the Indian Trusts Act and governed by PFRDA (NPS Trust) Regulations 2015. **The Trap:** The settlor creates the trust. PFRDA created NPS Trust to hold subscriber assets separately from the regulatory body. **Cross-Exam Context:** Settlor = PFRDA. Trust = holds assets. Trustee Bank = Axis. Custodian = SHCIL. This chain ensures asset protection. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Explain the trust structure to clients as a safety mechanism. Their assets are legally separated from the regulator and intermediaries.
